U

UnderlinedComboBox<E> - Class in app.gui.components
A customized generic drop-down selection list box styled with a minimalist bottom underline instead of standard full borders.
UnderlinedComboBox() - Constructor for class app.gui.components.UnderlinedComboBox
Constructs an empty selection combo box, initializing properties and borders.
UnderlinedComboBox(E[]) - Constructor for class app.gui.components.UnderlinedComboBox
Constructs a choice selector initialized with a flat item collection array.
UnderlinedDateTimePicker - Class in app.gui.components
A sleek, flat-designed version of the DateTimePicker widget.
UnderlinedDateTimePicker() - Constructor for class app.gui.components.UnderlinedDateTimePicker
Constructs a pre-configured, styled date-time picker preset to an English formatting locale.
UnderlinedTextField - Class in app.gui.components
A customized text input component styled with a minimalist bottom underline instead of a boxed frame.
UnderlinedTextField(int) - Constructor for class app.gui.components.UnderlinedTextField
Constructs an empty UnderlinedTextField using a fixed capacity column constraint.
UnderlinedTextField(String) - Constructor for class app.gui.components.UnderlinedTextField
Constructs an UnderlinedTextField populated with an initial text string and a default column allocation.
update(double) - Method in class app.service.impl.indicators.IndicatorsServiceImpl.MacdCalculator.EmaCalculator
Calculates the initial simple average baseline, scaling later into exponential updates.
update(DataRecord) - Method in class app.service.impl.indicators.IndicatorsServiceImpl.CmfCalculator
Computes active Money Flow Multiplier metrics, scaling values against structural volume sizes, and rolls buffer ring configurations forward.
update(DataRecord) - Method in class app.service.impl.indicators.IndicatorsServiceImpl.MacdCalculator
Passes the active pricing quote point down to execute recursive underlying state updates.
update(DataRecord, DataRecord) - Method in class app.service.impl.indicators.IndicatorsServiceImpl.AtrCalculator
Captures historical pricing rows to resolve the relative peak and boundary gaps.
update(DataRecord, DataRecord) - Method in class app.service.impl.indicators.IndicatorsServiceImpl.RsiCalculator
Updates sequential parameters tracking relative upward and downward close differences.
